metadata.description: UIForge — a taste compiler for UI: bring a reference, it compiles the spec, sources to it, and loops to slop-free.

plugins.name: uiforge
plugins.description: A taste compiler for UI. Bring a reference (or a committed direction); UIForge measures it into a signature spec, ranks fitting components from a 294-item catalog, and loops the build on a two-tier gate (source linter + rendered WCAG/craft audit, reference-relative) — WCAG contrast held as an absolute a11y floor.
